title: New Employee Welcome Pack
subject: Welcome to the Company - IT Access Details

title: VPN Access Enabled
subject: VPN Access Has Been Enabled
body:
Hello {full_name},

Your VPN access is now enabled.

Please test connectivity and confirm you can access internal resources.
If you face any issue, reply with a screenshot and timestamp.

Reference: {ticket_id}

Best regards,
IT Support Team

title: Shared Drive Permission Granted
subject: Shared Drive Access Granted
body:
Hello {full_name},

Your requested shared drive permissions are now active.

Please verify read/write behavior as requested and confirm back on this email.
Reference Ticket: {ticket_id}

Best regards,
IT Support Team

title: Standard Password Reset
subject: Password Reset Completed
body:
Hello {full_name},

Your password has been reset.

Temporary Password: {temp_password}

Please log in and set a new password immediately.
If login fails, reply to this email and we will assist.

Best regards,
IT Support Team

title: MFA Enrollment Required
subject: Action Required - Complete MFA Enrollment
body:
Hello {full_name},

To improve account security, please complete MFA enrollment by end of day.

Enrollment Link: https://example.local/mfa

If you need support during setup, contact IT Service Desk.

Best regards,
IT Support Team

title: Issue Follow-Up (Pending Response)
subject: Follow-up on Your Support Request
body:
Hello {full_name},

This is a follow-up regarding your support ticket ({ticket_id}).

Please let us know if the issue is resolved.
If still open, share an update and we will continue assisting.

Best regards,
IT Support Team

title: Incident Acknowledgement
subject: We Have Received Your Incident Report
body:
Hello {full_name},

We have received your incident report and our team is investigating.

Reference Ticket: {ticket_id}

We will provide updates as soon as new information is available.

Best regards,
IT Support Team

title: Software Installation Completed
subject: Requested Software Installation Completed
body:
Hello {full_name},

The requested software has been installed on your assigned device.

Please open the application and confirm it launches correctly.
If you need license activation help, reply to this email.

Best regards,
IT Support Team

title: License Assignment Confirmation
subject: Application License Assigned
body:
Hello {full_name},

Your application license is now assigned to your account ({email}).

Please sign out and sign back in if the license features are not visible immediately.

Best regards,
IT Support Team

title: Ticket Closure Notice
subject: Support Ticket Closed
body:
Hello {full_name},

As we have not received further updates, your ticket ({ticket_id}) is now marked as closed.

If the issue reoccurs, reply to this email and we will reopen the request promptly.

Best regards,
IT Support Team
